name_cn:
Genuine quality
CELINE 2022 Fall/Winter DansParis Collection Handbag
Effortless chic. The imperceptible trend of rapid updates, high brand recognition in daily wear! Lock-and-shoulder one-loop design, classic buckle, retro and modern elements intertwined! Presenting the capable and elegant casualness of professional women! (Pure steel hardware)
Style No.: 199913 Grey (with original packaging)
 Dimensions: 25×22×14
